Additional_services requires any enhancement services with costs; the plan states 'None selected at this time' but does not list costs (none to list) – this is acceptable because it's explicitly none; however, the format expects 'with costs' when applicable, and 'None' is a complete specification of no services. Total_budget requires a complete monthly/annual cost breakdown; it provides €340/month but no annual equivalent. Since the format asks for monthly/annual cost breakdown, the annual cost is missing, so this item is not fully specified.
